meta.name: MD Saib Hossain
meta.title: AI Researcher • Medical Imaging • Agentic AI Systems
meta.bio: Building clinically deployable AI for lung cancer screening using deep learning on CT imaging. Published in IEEE ICCIT 2025. Developing secure, multi-agent workflows with cryptographic provenance for LLM safety.

quickLinks.label: Research
quickLinks.desc: Medical Imaging, Agentic AI, LLM Safety

quickLinks.label: Projects
quickLinks.desc: RAG, Agentic AI, CV, LLM fine-tuning

researchInterests.title: Medical Imaging & Clinical AI
researchInterests.description: Deep learning pipelines for CT-based lung cancer screening, radiomic feature extraction, and survival analysis using Cox models. Focus on clinical deployability and bias mitigation.

researchInterests.title: Agentic AI & Multi-Agent Systems
researchInterests.description: Architecting autonomous multi-agent workflows with LLM orchestration for complex task automation. Emphasis on stateful reasoning, tool use, and production reliability.

researchInterests.title: LLM Safety & RAG Security
researchInterests.description: Cryptographic provenance frameworks for secure agentic workflows. Hallucination detection, prompt injection defense, and retrieval-augmented generation reliability.

researchInterests.title: Applied ML & Data Systems
researchInterests.description: End-to-end ML pipelines: data harmonization, cross-domain generalization, model evaluation, and latency optimization for real-world deployment.

accepted.title: Unifying Adult and Pediatric Domains: Multi-Dataset Deep Learning for Fracture Classification, Detection, and Segmentation
accepted.summary: Unified training pipeline harmonizing FracAtlas (adult) and GRAZPEDWRI-DX (pediatric) datasets. Achieved +3.8% AUC, +4.2% mAP, +2.7% Dice via ResNet-50, YOLOv8/v11, DeepLabV3.

accepted.title: BanglaSign-Tutor: Interactive Sign Language Learning via Finger-Guided Feedback
accepted.summary: Computer vision + Gemma 3 LLM pipeline for BDSL recognition. 98.2% alphabet / 99.5% numeral accuracy. 56.43% reduction in learning latency via real-time haptic feedback.

accepted.title: Urban Sustainability in Bangladesh: Satellite-Based Land Use & Air Pollution Analysis
accepted.summary: Google Earth Engine analysis of LULC and pollution trends (2019–2025). Comparative evaluation of six ML algorithms including Random Forest and XGBoost.

underReview.title: Prompt Injection is an Authorization Problem: Cryptographic Provenance for Secure Agentic Workflows
underReview.summary: Proposes a security framework for LLM agents using cryptographic context validation to prevent prompt injection and ensure workflow integrity.

underReview.title: COAST: Clinical Oncology Architecture for Survival Translation with Reliable Prediction and Clinical Decision Support
underReview.summary: System architecture for a clinically deployable survival prediction model integrating deep learning features with clinical data using Cox Proportional Hazards framework.

featuredProjects.title: Self-RAG System
featuredProjects.description: Autonomous RAG with query rewriting, relevance grading, hallucination detection using LangGraph & OpenAI. Improves factual accuracy via self-reflection loops.

featuredProjects.title: Agentic Interviewer
featuredProjects.description: Autonomous AI interviewer that parses resumes, generates tailored assessments, and conducts stateful technical conversations with real-time evaluation.

featuredProjects.title: MedAssist-LLM
featuredProjects.description: Fine-tuned Qwen2.5-0.5B medical QA model optimized for fully offline inference on iPhone X. Edge-deployable clinical decision support.

featuredProjects.title: Eye-of-LLM
featuredProjects.description: Autonomous vision agent using YOLOv11 and Gemini 2.5 Flash. Real-time object segmentation from camera feed routed to LLM for context-aware identification.

featuredProjects.title: Synthetic Face Generation
featuredProjects.description: StyleGAN2 and Stable Diffusion XL pipeline for synthetic face dataset generation to address data scarcity in facial analysis tasks.

current.focus: Building next-gen agentic AI systems for production workflow automation using Python and LLM orchestration.
Deep learning pipelines for medical image analysis, radiomic feature extraction, and clinical AI governance research.

education.degree: BSc in Computer Science and Engineering
